description_long: This object is a compact solar energy infrastructure unit featuring a rectangular base with a prominent, dark-colored solar panel mounted on top. The solar panel is slightly elevated and appears to be supported by a robust frame, likely made of metal, with visible structural reinforcements. The base includes several box-like enclosures, possibly housing electrical components or batteries, and is accented with small colored elements that may indicate access points or status indicators. The overall design is utilitarian, with a focus on durability and weather resistance, suitable for urban deployment on flat surfaces. The object is relatively low in height but elongated, suggesting it is intended for ground or rooftop installation. Its surfaces are predominantly matte and hard, with a mix of dark and light gray tones and some red highlights.
description: A compact, rectangular solar energy unit with a raised dark solar panel, sturdy metal frame, and boxy base featuring colored accents.
description_view_0: Front view shows the elevated solar panel and the main access enclosure with colored highlights.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the elongated base, the thickness of the solar panel, and the supporting frame structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the panel and additional enclosures or housings on the base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlights the length of the base and the arrangement of structural supports.
attribute_panel_orientation: tilted at approximately 30 degrees, orientation appears fixed
attribute_mounting_structure_type: ground-mounted with a metal (likely aluminum) frame and reinforced base
attribute_array_configuration: single row of 1 panel, centrally mounted on the base
